title: Better Impaling
description: Improves Tridents by making them function like their Bedrock counterpart!
body:
![Better Impaling Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27734e5480e2b6c922cad64b5d5ada6751b8724e_0.webp)

The Java Impaling Enchantment was always underwhelming. It only dealt extra damage to aquatic mobs, including guardians, fish, and squids (not even drowned!). The Bedrock Impaling Enchantment, on the other hand, was overpowered. It dealt tons of extra damage to all mobs touching water or rain. This mod brings the better Bedrock Impaling behavior to Java!

 

This mod ONLY needs to be installed on the server to work
